title: Code Splitting with lazy and Suspense
description: Load components only when needed to reduce bundle size.

slides.title: Split Your Bundle ✂️
Error Handling with Error Boundaries
slides.content: If the dynamic import fails (network error), you can catch it with an error boundary.

quizData.question: React.lazy only works with default exports.
quizData.explanation: Yes, `React.lazy` currently only supports default exports. If you have a named export, you can re‑export it as default in an intermediate module.
